description: Akso Health Group, together with its subsidiaries, operates a social e-commerce mobile platform in the People's Republic of China. It operates Xiaobai Maimai App, a social e-commerce mobile platform that offers food and beverage products, wine, cosmetic products, fashion and apparel, entertainment products, housewares, home appliances, and cost-saving promotions at petrol gas stations. The company also sells medical devices, such as defibrillators and anesthesia laryngoscopes.
